headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -45.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 49% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 159 quotes and exceptionally high intensity - 117 strong-intensity quotes are driving the elevated score.
• At 48.3, frustration levels remain well above the typical range, sitting in the upper third of the 150-day span.
• Fears and optimism both improved from yesterday's lows but stay suppressed, with fears recovering 8 points and optimism gaining 6.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
